title: Sweet Things + a Washi Tape Giveaway
excerpt: The smile tag that we did for Studio Calico's June kit last year has shown up in a number of places, and most recently on the cover of Scrapbook Trends' January issue on a layout by Kelly Purkey . Side…
body:
The smile tag that we did for Studio Calico's June kit last year has shown up in a number of places, and most recently on the cover of Scrapbook Trends' January issue on a layout by Kelly Purkey.

Side note: What amuses me about this photo is that a kind stranger in New York who was strolling by while we were taking photos in the freezing cold, asked if she could take a photo for us. And she not only took one, but several, just to give us options. If I had any idea it would end up on a cover of a magazine, I would have handed Kelly's purse back to her.

And now, we have a new exclusive set of hand-embroidered tags available at Two Peas In A Bucket.  They are made in Los Angeles by my lovely staff of stitchers who also embroider our tees. Turns out they don't have a preference for fabric or paper, and they are all made with love.

I used this one in week 5 of Project Life. Combining some washi tapes and stickers and all around good stuff is what I am loving about Project Life. It gives all those goodies I have been collecting the perfect home. The Love card is from Jamaica Makes.

And to celebrate all this sweetness, we're giving away this set of washi tapes from Made With Love.

To enter to win, do one of the following or all, to increase your chances:

1) "Like" Made With Love on Facebook and leave a comment saying you did.

2) Tweet about this giveaway and be sure to include @amytangerine somewhere in your tweet (but not at the beginning as a response) and leave a comment with your twitter handle.

3) Go to Two Peas in a Bucket and let me know in the comments which tag is your favorite.

One lucky winner will be chosen this Friday, February 10, 2012.
